notes: v27: Cleaned model. Removed circular outcome features (like_ratio, svf_log, engage_ratio, rpv) that inflated v26 to R²=0.94. Two honest models: pre-upload (6 features, CV=0.350) and full (12 features, CV=0.664).

pre_upload_model.description: What you can predict BEFORE shooting. 6 features knowable from concept + retention curve.

feature_descriptions.keep_sq: Keep rate squared — accelerating returns above 75%
feature_descriptions.max_cliff: Biggest single-point retention drop — signals initial virality spike
feature_descriptions.keep_x_tension: Keep rate × narrative tension count interaction

full_model.description: After seeing early signals (trajectory, previous video momentum). 12 features from forward selection on v20.

feature_descriptions.keep_sq: Keep rate squared — accelerating returns above 75%
feature_descriptions.indestructible_x_prev_keep: Indestructible concept × previous keep rate — release strategy signal
feature_descriptions.deriv_entropy: Pacing complexity — entropy of retention curve derivative
feature_descriptions.prev_views: Previous video's log10 views — channel momentum
feature_descriptions.prev_keep: Previous video's keep rate — audience priming
feature_descriptions.smoothed_slope: Slope of 5-pt moving avg retention curve — overall decay trend
feature_descriptions.pat_making_v2: Title contains making/build/creat/construct — build content flag
feature_descriptions.duration_x_retention: Duration × retention = total watch time proxy
feature_descriptions.ret_mid_sq: Midpoint retention squared — non-linear mid-video engagement
feature_descriptions.idea_length: Word count of video concept — concept richness
feature_descriptions.view_accel_log: Log10 of day3-7 avg / day1 views — early trajectory (post-upload)
feature_descriptions.w2_w1_ratio: Week2 / Week1 view ratio — sustained growth (post-upload)

circular_outcomes.reason: These are outcome variables measured AFTER the video being predicted is uploaded. They correlate with views because they ARE consequences of views (engagement rates, revenue per view, subscriber view fraction). Including them inflated v26 to CV=0.94 — a meaningless number for prediction. The ceiling test (exp_ceiling_test) showed all outcome variables push CV to 0.83, confirming circularity.
references: exp_ceiling_test: Adding circular outcome signals pushes CV to 0.83

v1.note: Baseline: keep + retention + z_score + vz_score + novelty + cognitive_load + net_novelty

v13.note: Milestone: CV > 0.50. Channel momentum + concept interactions
